headline: HDFC Life -2% despite Q1 profit +12% YoY to Rs611cr; VNB growth just 9%, HDFC Bank tie-up channel soft
gist: HDFC Life fell 2% despite 12% YoY profit growth to Rs611cr; VNB growth of only 9% and softness in the HDFC Bank bancassurance channel weighed on sentiment.

headline: IT majors rally (HCLTech +2.7%, Infosys +1.9%, TCS +1.3%) ahead of Wipro, TechM Q1 results due tonight
gist: Nifty IT led sector gains as HCLTech, Infosys, TechM, Wipro and TCS rallied ahead of Wipro and Tech Mahindra Q1 FY27 results due after market hours.

headline: Fresh US strikes on Iran, reinstated naval blockade near Strait of Hormuz keep oil near 4-day highs
gist: US carried out fresh strikes on Iranian targets and reinstated a naval blockade near the Strait of Hormuz, keeping WTI/Brent near multi-day highs on supply-disruption fears, though profit-booking capped further upside.

headline: EIA: +61 Bcf natgas storage build (vs +59 Bcf est.) for week to Jul 3 pushes stockpiles 6.6% above 5-yr avg
gist: EIA reported a bearish-surprise 61 Bcf storage injection for the week ending July 3 (vs 59 Bcf expected), leaving inventories 6.6% above the five-year average and capping natgas price upside.

headline: Fed holds rates 12-0 at 3.50-3.75%, but dot plot splits 9-hike/8-hold/1-cut; gold slips on hawkish tilt
gist: The Fed held rates unanimously at its June meeting, but a split dot plot (9 of 18 members favoring a hike before year-end) tempered rate-cut hopes, pressuring gold and silver lower after last week's CPI-driven bounce.
